com.mentor.chs.plugin.wiringdesigngenerator

Interface IXDiagramPartitionerPlugin

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin

    public interface IXDiagramPartitionerPlugin
extends IXPlugin
    This plugin will be used by CAVAI to determine the creation of partition diagrams for a functional diagram

    Usage pattern 1 : A plugin with UI, that creates/modifies settings

    1. The user launches CAVAI UI and selects functionally partitioned generation, functional designs, vehicle configurations, harness levels
    2. User selects a partitioning plugin from a list of available plugins. The plugin has a UI configurer
    System starts plugin UI
    System invokes 
     {
                IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer  configurer  = selectedPlugin.getPartitionConfigurer();
                //configurer is not null
                        m_pluginSettingsForTheSession  = getExistingSettingsForPlugin(selectedPlugin ); //get saved settings
                        JPanel panel = configure.getPanel(m_pluginSettingsForTheSession, wiringDesignGeneratorContext);
                //panel is non null for a plugin with UI
                        //The panel is embedded within CAVAI dialog
                }
    3. User completes plugin configuration.
    System invokes 
     {
                IXPartitionerConfigurationResult settingsResult = new ConfigurationResultImpl(m_pluginSettingsForTheSession);
                configurer.getSettings(settingsResult);
                //Plugin returns updated settings.
                //From the result, system reads the updated settings to be used for the session and persists the settings if
 required.
 }
    4. User clicks "OK" on CAVAI dialog
    System invokes:
     {
                //The plugin settings for the session passed to the partitioner
                IXDiagramPartitioner partitioner =
                                selectedPlugin.getDiagramPartitioner(m_pluginSettingsForTheSession, wiringDesignGeneratorContext);
                //The partitioner object is used by CAVAI during diagram genertion
 }
    Usage pattern 2: A plugin without UI, does not create/modify settings.
    In this usage, the plugin does not have to implement IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer. IXDiagramPartitionerPlugin.getPartitionConfigurer() will return null.

    1. The user launches CAVAI UI and selects functionally partitioned generation, multiple configurations, harness levels
    2. User selects a partitioning plugin from a list of available plugins. Plugin does not have a configurer.
    3. User clicks "OK" on CAVAI dialog
    System invokes:
     {
                m_pluginSettingsForTheSession  = getExistingSettingsForPlugin(selectedPlugin ); //get saved settings
                //The plugin settings for the session passed to the partitioner
                //obtain the partitioner from the plugin for use
                IXDiagramPartitioner partitioner =
                                selectedPlugin.getDiagramPartitioner(m_pluginSettingsForTheSession, wiringDesignGeneratorContext);
                //The partitioner object is used by CAVAI during diagram genertion
 }
    Usage pattern 3: A plugin without UI, that can create/modify settings
    In this usage, implementations will return null for IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer.getPanel(). IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer.getSettings() will return updated settings

    1. The user launches CAVAI UI and selects functionally partitioned generation, multiple configurations, harness levels
    2. User selects a partitioning plugin from a list of available plugins. The plugin does not have a configuration UI but provides settings for persistence
    3. User clicks "OK" on CAVAI dialog
    System invokes:
     {
                IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer  configurer  = selectedPlugin.getPartitionConfigurer();
                //configurer.getPanel() is null, no UI for the plugin
                IXPartitionerConfigurationResult settingsResult = new ConfigurationResultImpl(m_pluginSettingsForTheSession);
                configurer.getSettings(settingsResult);
                //Plugin returns updated settings.
                //From the result, system reads the updated settings to be used for the session and persists the settings if
 required.
 }

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXDiagramPartitioner getDiagramPartitioner(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> settings, IXWiringDesignGeneratorContext wiringDesignGeneratorContext)
      This method returns a diagram partitioner object which is used by CAVAI during diagram generation to determine the partition diagrams that have to be created.
      Implementations should not launch UI for any interactive modification of settings in this method.
      IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer getPartitionConfigurer(IXWiringDesignGeneratorContext wiringDesignGeneratorContext)
      A plugin can be configured before CAVAI diagram generation.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • getDiagramPartitioner

        IXDiagramPartitioner getDiagramPartitioner(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> settings,
                                           IXWiringDesignGeneratorContext wiringDesignGeneratorContext)
        This method returns a diagram partitioner object which is used by CAVAI during diagram generation to determine the partition diagrams that have to be created.
        Implementations should not launch UI for any interactive modification of settings in this method. However, the input settings parameter can be ignored if the settings are available elsewhere. Example, a file.
        Parameters:
        settings - Settings of the plugin. If there are no settings available in the system for this plugin, the passed map will be empty.
        wiringDesignGeneratorContext - Wiring design generator context
        Returns:
        A partitioner object that would be used by CAVAI during diagram generation

      • getPartitionConfigurer

        IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer getPartitionConfigurer(IXWiringDesignGeneratorContext wiringDesignGeneratorContext)
        A plugin can be configured before CAVAI diagram generation. This method will be invoked by CAVAI to obtain a parition configuration object.
        Parameters:
        wiringDesignGeneratorContext - Wiring design generator context
        Returns:
        Return a partition configuration object. A null can be returned if a plugin does not require configuration
